title: ONGC Energy Centre – Junior Project Fellow, Project Associates and More – 5 Posts

basic_details.job_title: ONGC Energy Centre Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Project Fellow, Project Associates and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: ONGC Energy Centre Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Project Fellows/Associates. Candidates with M.Tech/B.Tech/M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through ONGC Energy Centre official website ongcindia.com.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/B.Tech/M.Sc in Geology/Geophysics/Geosciences/Mechanical Engineering/Biotechnology/Microbiology, Minimum 60% marks, 2-6 years experience in relevant energy domain

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 7.58 Lakhs - Rs. 11.88 Lakhs Per Annum

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ONGC Energy Centre Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: ONGC Energy Centre Junior Project Associate (Geologist)
